Name: Classic Margarita
Description: Tequila, lime juice, and triple sec served on the rocks with a salted rim.

Name: Old Fashioned
Description: Bourbon, Angostura bitters, sugar, and a twist of orange peel.

Name: Moscow Mule
Description: Vodka, ginger beer, and fresh lime juice served in a copper mug.

Name: Craft IPA
Description: Locally brewed India Pale Ale with citrus and pine hop notes.

Name: House Red Wine
Description: A smooth Cabernet Sauvignon with notes of dark cherry and oak.

Name: Loaded Nachos
Description: Tortilla chips topped with cheddar, jalapeños, pico de gallo, sour cream, and guacamole.

Name: Buffalo Wings
Description: Crispy chicken wings tossed in spicy buffalo sauce with ranch dipping sauce.

Name: Mozzarella Sticks
Description: Golden-fried mozzarella served with marinara dipping sauce.

Name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
Description: Creamy blend of spinach, artichoke hearts, and parmesan served with toasted pita.

Name: Classic Burger
Description: Half-pound Angus beef patty with lettuce, tomato, onion, and pickles on a brioche bun. Served with fries.

Name: Grilled Salmon
Description: Atlantic salmon fillet with lemon-dill butter, roasted vegetables, and rice pilaf.

Name: BBQ Ribs
Description: Slow-smoked half rack of baby back ribs with house BBQ sauce, coleslaw, and cornbread.

Name: Fish & Chips
Description: Beer-battered cod fillets with crispy fries, tartar sauce, and malt vinegar.

Name: Chicken Caesar Salad
Description: Grilled chicken breast over romaine with parmesan, croutons, and house Caesar dressing.

Name: Chocolate Lava Cake
Description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.

Name: New York Cheesecake
Description: Creamy cheesecake with a graham cracker crust and fresh berry compote.

Name: Apple Crisp
Description: Warm spiced apples topped with oat crumble and caramel drizzle, served with whipped cream.

Name: Espresso Martini
Description: Vodka, coffee liqueur, and fresh espresso shaken to perfection.
